allow: Bash(docker compose exec -T postgres pg_isready -U oddscast -d oddscast)
Bash(docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U oddscast -d oddscast -tAc "SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema=''oddscast'' AND table_name=''users'' LIMIT 1")
Bash(docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U oddscast -d oddscast -tAc "SELECT ""loginId"", name FROM oddscast.admin_users LIMIT 5")

Bash(docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U oddscast -d oddscast -c "INSERT INTO oddscast.admin_users \(""loginId"",password,name\) VALUES \(''admin'',''$2b$10$W758e6SSlEFec.GsYHILtOW3D.OvgjwtyyEAQFQttwa3ly1JIQCXO'',''Administrator''\) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;")
Bash(for p in code-review commit-commands feature-dev security-guidance typescript-lsp)
Bash(for p in code-review commit-commands feature-dev typescript-lsp frontend-design)

Bash(GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: migrate webapp UI to shadcn/ui, persist onboarding to DB, unify back navigation

- Replace custom CSS components \(buttons, cards, badges, forms, messages, links\)
  with shadcn/ui primitives \(Button, Card, Badge, Input, Dialog, Select, etc.\)
- Add cn\(\) utility, components.json, and Radix UI dependencies
- Create backward-compatible wrappers: SimpleTooltip, Toggle \(Switch\)
- Delete 7 CSS files, add CSS variable aliases in globals.css for plain CSS
- Add hasSeenOnboarding column to users table for cross-device persistence
- Update auth service: updateProfile saves onboarding state, login allows
  unverified users \(verification only required at registration\)
- Unify back navigation: replace all BackLink with CompactPageTitle,
  delete unused BackLink component

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: on-demand KRA result fetch and decouple Gemini from KRA sync

- Add on-demand result fetch in RacesService.findOne\(\): when a user
  views a race that has ended but has no results, trigger KRA API
  fetch with 1-min cooldown per rcDate to prevent excessive calls
- Decouple Gemini prediction generation from KRA result sync:
  replace onResultsSyncedForRace \(accuracy + Gemini\) with
  updateAccuracyOnly \(accuracy only\) in fetchRaceResults
- Remove generatePredictionsForDate fire-and-forget call from
  processDueBatchSchedules to prevent Gemini 429 cascading to KRA
- Predictions are now handled independently by PredictionsScheduler

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 \(1M context\) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
